expectations.text: Asks at least 2 clarifying questions before proposing a solution
expectations.evidence: 5 questions: language support, doc type, output location, update existing docs, doc standard. 4 critical + 1 nice-to-have. All with multiple-choice options and recommended defaults.

expectations.text: References actual files or patterns from the cape project codebase
expectations.evidence: References agents/codebase-investigator.md:1-41, agents/internet-researcher.md:1-43, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, settings.json. Identifies specific patterns: frontmatter fields, file naming, structure, closing directive.

expectations.text: Proposes at least 2 distinct approaches with pros and cons
expectations.evidence: 3 approaches: (1) Mirror existing agent pattern (selected), (2) Agent with companion skill (rejected), (3) Agent with external tool integration (rejected). All have pros, cons, and rationale.

expectations.text: Epic contains a Requirements (IMMUTABLE) section with specific, testable statements
expectations.evidence: Epic has '## Requirements (IMMUTABLE)' with 7 items, e.g., 'Agent file at agents/doc-writer.md follows existing agent frontmatter pattern' and 'Agent is language-agnostic: works with any source language without hardcoded parsers'.

expectations.text: Anti-patterns use 'NO X (reason: Y)' format with reasoning
expectations.evidence: 6 anti-patterns: 'NO hardcoded language parsers (reason: agent must be language-agnostic...)', 'NO external tool dependencies (reason: existing agents have zero deps...)', 'NO generating docs without checking existing docs first (reason: ...)', etc.

expectations.text: Creates exactly one first task, not zero or multiple
expectations.evidence: Exactly one task: 'Task 1: Create agents/doc-writer.md' with goal, implementation steps referencing existing agents, and success criteria.
No source code or agent files created. Output is design documentation only.

expectations.text: Includes a Key Decisions table with Question/Answer/Implication columns
expectations.evidence: Key decisions table with 6 rows: Language support, Doc type, Output location, Update existing, Doc standard, Model. All three columns present.
